name: Biology Concepts Lab
topic_groups: Living/non-living, plant parts, animals, food, hygiene, habitats, life cycles
Cells, tissues, body systems, nutrition, respiration, transport, reproduction, heredity
Photosynthesis, ecosystems, biodiversity, adaptation, microbes, disease prevention, sustainability
Respectful handling of body, reproduction, health, observation, and field-study topics
fixes: Added caveats for flowering plants, fruits, seeds, and plant reproduction.
Improved root, photosynthesis, lifecycle, and ecosystem simplifications.
Added source and scope language to avoid textbook-replacement claims.
limitations: Not medical advice, diagnosis, or health instruction.
Biology examples are conceptual; sensitive body/health topics require adult/teacher handling.
